title: IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions:
IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow Ventures Solutions!
